news.title: KfW issues €100m crypto bond on Polygon (ICMA tracker)
news.body: ICMA's bond-market FinTech tracker lists KfW's June 9, 2026 'crypto bond' issuance using blockchain-based infrastructure on Polygon, with a reported size of about $100m.
news.source: ICMA Tracker of New FinTech Applications in Bond Markets

news.title: Binance Research: tokenized RWA market reached $31.8B in May
news.body: A report highlighted that the tokenized RWA market climbed to $31.8B in May, up 589% since early 2025. The analysis suggests RWAs continued to expand even as broader crypto markets pulled back.

news.title: Datavault AI links RWA tokenization to 24/7 regulated commodity trading
news.body: Datavault AI announced an initiative tying its RWA tokenization efforts to always-on regulated commodity trading. The effort targets tokenized physical commodities such as copper and minerals via a regulated international trading venue.

news.title: Largest US banks reportedly plan a shared tokenized-deposit network via The Clearing House
news.body: A Wall Street Journal report says JPMorgan, Citi and other large US banks are planning a shared tokenized-deposit network, with an initial launch target in 1H 2027. If confirmed, this would be one of the most coordinated moves by incumbent banks toward tokenized deposit rails.

news.title: Goldman Sachs-backed GS DAP used for new tokenized real estate fund project (Apex Group, Archax)
news.body: Multiple crypto newswires report that Goldman Sachs is involved in a tokenized real-estate fund initiative via GS DAP alongside Apex Group and Archax. Details are still limited; treat as early-stage reporting until confirmed by a first-party release.

news.title: SEC still evaluating path for tokenized stocks, analysts say
news.body: TD Cowen commentary highlighted that US regulators are still moving slowly on frameworks for tokenized equities, keeping timelines uncertain for broader market adoption.

news.title: Goldman Sachs launches tokenized real estate fund via GS DAP with Apex Group and Archax
news.body: KuCoin reports that Goldman Sachs launched a tokenized real estate fund using its GS DAP platform with Apex Group and Archax.

news.title: Goldman Sachs launches tokenized real estate fund project via GS DAP with Apex Group and Archax
news.body: Multiple market feeds report Goldman Sachs is working with Apex Group and Archax on a tokenized real estate fund initiative using GS DAP. Primary-source confirmation on goldmansachs.com was not found in this run.

news.title: Major U.S. banks reportedly plan a tokenized deposit network
news.body: The Wall Street Journal reports a group of large U.S. banks are exploring a shared tokenized-deposit system as a response to stablecoins and onchain settlement demand. Details remain unconfirmed by the banks in official press releases in this run.

news.title: U.S. banks reportedly plan tokenized deposit network
news.body: The Wall Street Journal reports that major U.S. banks are exploring a shared tokenized-deposit network as a bank-led alternative to stablecoins and crypto-native settlement rails. The effort would aim to keep deposit money inside the regulated banking system while enabling near-instant settlement.

news.title: Goldman Sachs reportedly launches tokenized real estate fund with Apex and Archax
news.body: CryptoRank reports Goldman Sachs has launched a tokenized real estate fund in partnership with Apex and Archax, highlighting continued institutional experimentation with on-chain fund structures.

news.title: Report: major U.S. banks plan a tokenized deposit network to compete with stablecoins
news.body: The Wall Street Journal reports a consortium including JPMorgan and Citi is planning a tokenized-deposit system, signaling banks’ push to modernize settlement rails while keeping deposits within the banking system.

news.title: Goldman Sachs GS DAP used for tokenized real estate fund issuance
news.body: A tokenized real estate fund was issued using Goldman Sachs' GS DAP distributed ledger, with Archax and Apex cited as partners.

news.title: Major U.S. banks reportedly plan tokenized deposit network via The Clearing House
news.body: A Wall Street Journal report says large U.S. banks are exploring a shared tokenized-deposit network operated by The Clearing House, with an initial rollout targeted for 2027. The initiative is positioned as a bank-led alternative to stablecoin-based payment rails.

news.title: Brazil's B3 prepares tokenized securities infrastructure for H2 2026
news.body: Brazil's stock exchange B3 said it is building a blockchain-based replica of its depository database as a first step toward tokenized securities. Executives framed the near-term phase as infrastructure work rather than immediate on-chain trading.

news.title: Goldman Sachs launches tokenized real estate fund with Apex and Archax
news.body: Reports say Goldman Sachs has launched a tokenized real estate fund in partnership with Apex and Archax, built on its GS DAP platform. The move highlights renewed momentum in institutional tokenization beyond cash-like products.

news.title: Largest U.S. banks plan a tokenized deposit network to compete with crypto
news.body: The Wall Street Journal reports a group of major U.S. banks are planning a shared tokenized deposit system aimed at improving settlement and countering stablecoin-based payment rails. The initiative would extend bank-issued deposit tokens beyond single-bank pilots.

news.title: Crypto liquidations near $1B over 24 hours as BTC and ETH lead sell-off
news.body: KuCoin reported more than $980M in crypto liquidations over the last 24 hours, with Bitcoin and Ethereum accounting for the largest share.

news.title: Brazil's B3 prepares tokenized stocks initiative for H2 2026
news.body: Brazil's main exchange B3 said it is building a blockchain-based digital twin of its depository database as a first step toward tokenized equities later in 2026.

news.title: BlackRock BUIDL fund value shown around $2.41B on RWA.xyz
news.body: RWA.xyz lists BlackRock's BUIDL tokenized money market fund value at about $2.41B, indicating continued growth in tokenized Treasury/money-market products.

news.title: European Commission opens MiCA review consultation, including tokenised financial instruments
news.body: The European Commission launched a consultation on the MiCA review, explicitly covering how tokenised financial instruments and stablecoins should be treated within EU regulatory perimeter.

news.title: Saudi Arabia: e-payments reach 85% of retail transactions
news.body: SAMA reported e-payments represented 85% of total retail payment transactions in Saudi Arabia in 2025, highlighting ongoing digitization of consumer payments and settlement rails.

news.title: UAE central bank approves dirham-backed stablecoin DDSC for operational launch
news.body: The Central Bank of the UAE approved a dirham-backed stablecoin (DDSC) to move into operational launch, signaling continued regulatory support for tokenized money and payments infrastructure in the region.

news.title: Saudi Central Bank says e-payments reached 85% of retail payments in 2025
news.body: SAMA reported that electronic payments represented 85% of total retail payments in 2025, highlighting continued digitization of the payments ecosystem. This is relevant for regional stablecoin and tokenized settlement adoption monitoring.

news.title: CBUAE approves UAE dirham-backed stablecoin DDSC for operational launch
news.body: The Central Bank of the UAE approved the dirham-backed stablecoin DDSC to go live, with IHC, Sirius International Holding, and First Abu Dhabi Bank stating it will operate on ADI Chain and target regulated institutional use cases.

news.title: Saudi central bank says e-payments reached 85% of retail payments in 2025
news.body: SAMA reported e-payments accounted for 85% of total retail payments in 2025, underscoring continued digitization of the payments stack across the Kingdom.

news.title: SAMA: E-payments accounted for 85% of total retail payments in 2025
news.body: Saudi Central Bank (SAMA) reported e-payments reached 85% of total retail payments in 2025, highlighting continued digitization of the payments ecosystem.

news.title: SAMA says e-payments accounted for 85% of Saudi retail payments in 2025
news.body: Saudi Central Bank (SAMA) reported that e-payments represented 85% of total retail payments in 2025, highlighting continued digital payments adoption supporting future tokenized settlement use cases.

news.title: J.P. Morgan publishes Kinexys 2026 milestones update
news.body: J.P. Morgan Payments published an update outlining milestones for Kinexys in 2026, positioning it as part of the firm's tokenized payments and settlement roadmap.

news.title: SEC pauses tokenized stock plans as scrutiny around tokenized equities grows
news.body: Reports say the SEC has paused certain tokenized stock initiatives, adding near-term uncertainty for tokenized equity offerings in the U.S.

news.title: SEC pauses tokenized stock plans, raising issuer-consent concerns
news.body: Reporting says the SEC has paused plans that would have allowed digital-asset platforms to offer tokenized versions of publicly traded stocks without issuer consent, while also seeking input on prediction-market and event-contract ETF structures. The move underscores ongoing regulatory uncertainty for tokenized equities and related onchain market structures.

news.title: SEC pauses tokenized stock plans, report says
news.body: A report says the SEC has paused plans related to tokenized stock trading, highlighting regulatory uncertainty around tokenized equities in the U.S.

news.title: SEC pauses tokenized stock plans amid Trump crypto venture blowback
news.body: The U.S. SEC reportedly paused certain tokenized stock initiatives, highlighting ongoing regulatory uncertainty for onchain equity products.

news.title: SEC pauses tokenized stock plans amid pushback
news.body: Multiple reports say the SEC has paused/delayed plans that would allow broader exemptions for crypto firms to offer tokenized versions of U.S. stocks, after feedback from traditional market participants. The delay underscores continued regulatory uncertainty around tokenized equities in the U.S.

news.title: SEC pauses tokenized stock plans, Trump crypto ventures sour
news.body: A report says the SEC paused proposed tokenized stock plans, highlighting ongoing regulatory friction around onchain equities in the U.S.

news.title: Crypto ‘Extreme Fear’ Returns With Bitcoin At $75K – Retail Traders Say BTC Bulls Missed The Tech Rally
news.body: The overall cryptocurrency market experienced a downturn of 1.5%, bringing its total valuation to around $2.62 trillion.

news.title: Trump pledges to protect the crypto industry and ensure prediction markets ‘thrive’
news.body: Notable update; see source for details.

news.title: UAE reports a large dirham-backed stablecoin transaction involving FAB
news.body: Local media reported a Dh110m transaction using a UAE dirham-backed stablecoin, with First Abu Dhabi Bank mentioned as part of the initiative. If confirmed by official releases, it could signal accelerating real-world usage for AED-linked settlement rails.

news.title: Mercado Bitcoin announces $200M RWA issuance on Stellar Network
news.body: Brazil's largest crypto exchange Mercado Bitcoin announced a $200M tokenized RWA issuance on Stellar, with focus on private credit. 20% of MB custody is already RWA.

news.title: QNB issues Qatar's first native digital bond in $500M landmark deal
news.body: Qatar National Bank issued Qatar's first native digital bond, a $500 million landmark transaction. Issuance settled natively on DLT.

news.title: IHC, ADQ and FAB pioneer UAE Dirham-backed stablecoin
news.body: Three UAE institutions — IHC, ADQ and FAB — announced plans to launch a CBUAE-regulated Dirham-backed stablecoin issued by FAB.

news.title: Aptos approves Proposal 183: 2.1B APT supply cap and 100% gas burns
news.body: Aptos network passed Proposal 183 in March 2026 introducing a 2.1B APT hard supply cap, 100% gas-fee burns, and reduced staking rewards. BUIDL deployed $500M extra on Aptos.

news.title: MUFG Progmat pivots to Avalanche for tokenized securities
news.body: Japan's MUFG Progmat tokenization platform pivoted to Avalanche subnets in Feb 2026. MUFG issued public-offering digital subordinated bonds in Oct 2025.

news.title: ADGM FSRA announces FRT rules effective January 1, 2026
news.body: Abu Dhabi Global Market's FSRA presented enhancements to its Virtual Asset framework. Fiat-Referenced Token rules effective Jan 1, 2026 with 20+ regulated firms operating.

news.title: SEC is said to ready plan for trading tokenized stocks (innovation exemption)
news.summary: Bloomberg reports the SEC may release an innovation exemption framework to enable trading digital versions of securities (tokenized stocks) as soon as this week.

news.title: FinCEN and OFAC publish proposed rule for stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act (30-day comment period)
news.body: El 10 Abr 2026 FinCEN y OFAC emitieron una Proposed Rule para implementar requisitos AML/CFT y sanciones para permitted payment stablecoin issuers bajo GENIUS Act; comentarios hasta 9 Jun 2026.

news.title: Broadridge DLR: record volumes in March (+392% YoY)
news.summary: Broadridge reportó que su plataforma Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) procesó un promedio de ~$354B/día en marzo y casi $8T en volumen mensual (marzo), con crecimiento interanual de 392%.

news.title: Treasury Proposes Rule to Implement the GENIUS Act's ...
news.summary: U.S. Treasury (FinCEN/OFAC) issued a proposed rule implementing GENIUS Act AML and sanctions compliance requirements for permitted payment stablecoin issuers.

news.title: Securitize CEO: Tokenized Stocks Will DOUBLE Crypto - YouTube
news.summary:
🚨 The future of Wall Street is going on-chain.

At Consensus 2026 in Miami, Securitize Founder & CEO Carlos Domingo breaks down why tokenized equities, stablecoins, and AI-powered “agentic trading” could radically transform global capital m

news.title: Broadridge says DLR processed nearly $8T in March with $354B average daily volume
news.summary: Broadridge announced its Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) processed nearly $8 trillion in March and averaged $354 billion in daily repo transactions during the month, reporting 392% year-over-year growth.
